task: Fixed a P0 double-file-chooser race in Browse (a click bubbling from the button to its parent dropzone fired fileInput.click() twice). Found and fixed a real quality-contract violation: canvas.toBlob()/getImageData() read from the browser's internally premultiplied bitmap, corrupting RGB at any alpha < 255 in the actual exported PNG -- fixed with a dependency-free PNG encoder (js/pngEncoder.js) that exports straight from the authoritative pixel buffer, bypassing canvas entirely. Added the Cleanup Brush (erase-only, soft-edged, Undo/Redo/Reset) and Manual Crop, both operating on that same buffer. Added Overlay and Difference preview modes, the latter doubling as live proof the quality contract holds. Fixed a zoom-label race across the three preview panes' shared callback. Raised the Cleanup Brush's max size from 140px to 400px.
